app.emptyTitle: Select a Markdown file on the left
app.emptyDescription: Once a folder is open, its content and the editing surface will appear here.

unsavedDialog.title: Handle changes before switching
unsavedDialog.descriptionCurrent: The file {{fileLabel}} still has unsaved changes.
unsavedDialog.descriptionGeneric: The current file still has unsaved changes.
unsavedDialog.descriptionTarget: Choose an action before switching to {{targetLabel}}.
unsavedDialog.descriptionAiPending: There is also an unresolved AI suggestion for this file that hasn't been accepted or discarded yet.

deleteDialog.title: Delete file permanently?
deleteDialog.descriptionWithName: The file {{fileLabel}} will be permanently deleted from disk.
deleteDialog.descriptionGeneric: The file will be permanently deleted from disk.
deleteDialog.descriptionFolderWithName: The folder {{folderLabel}} and all files it contains will be permanently deleted from disk.
deleteDialog.descriptionFolderGeneric: The folder and all files it contains will be permanently deleted from disk.

settingsDialog.title: Settings
settingsDialog.apiKeyHint: Stored only locally on this device and sent only to the selected provider.
settingsDialog.cloudProviderNotice: With {{provider}}, the selected text or document leaves your device and is processed according to {{provider}}'s terms of use.

shortcutsDialog.title: Keyboard shortcuts
shortcutsDialog.description: These key combinations are available in the editor.

items.aiSubmit: Submit AI request (in the AI dialog)
items.bulletList: Insert bullet list (selection or cursor position)
items.orderedList: Insert numbered list (selection or cursor position)
items.moveListItem: Move list item (bullet, numbered or checklist)

sidebar.openFolderPrompt: Open a folder to see all Markdown files it contains.
sidebar.noMarkdownFiles: No Markdown files found. Open a folder containing `.md` files.

toolbar.aiCheckButtonTitleDisabled: Select text first to check spelling/grammar
toolbar.spellcheckDictionaryMissing: No spell-check dictionary found for "{{code}}". Install a Hunspell dictionary (e.g. hunspell-{{code}}) via your package manager.

aiRewriteDialog.promptPlaceholder: For example: Rewrite this paragraph to be clearer and shorter.
aiRewriteDialog.includeDocument: Include the entire document content as context

editor.imageRequiresFile: Images can only be inserted while editing a file inside an open folder.
editor.aiResponseError: The AI response could not be loaded.
editor.aiTipModel: Tip: Open the AI settings and enter a valid model.
editor.aiTipConnection: Tip: Check whether Ollama or Jan.ai is running and the API URL is reachable.
editor.aiTipGeneric: Tip: Check the AI settings and try again.

aiCheckDialog.title: Spelling & grammar check
aiCheckDialog.emptyDescription: The selected text looks good — no spelling or grammar issues were found.
aiCheckDialog.resolvedDescription: The text should now be error-free.

aiClient.endpointStatus: The AI endpoint responded with status {{status}}.
aiClient.urlMustBeLocal: The AI URL must point to a local HTTP endpoint.
aiClient.urlMustBeHttps: This cloud provider's API URL must start with https://.
aiClient.apiKeyRequired: Please enter an API key in the AI settings.
aiClient.modelRequired: Please specify a model in the AI settings.
aiClient.noUsableText: The AI did not return any usable text.
aiClient.invalidCheckResponse: The AI response could not be read as a list of spelling/grammar issues.

store.folderLoadError: The folder could not be loaded.
store.fileListRefreshError: The file list could not be refreshed.
store.fileLoadError: The file could not be loaded.
store.fileSaveError: The file could not be saved.
store.fileCreateError: The file could not be created.
store.folderCreateError: The folder could not be created.
store.fileAlreadyExists: A file with this name already exists.
store.folderAlreadyExists: A folder with this name already exists.
store.folderMoveIntoDescendantError: A folder can't be moved into one of its own subfolders.
store.entryMoveError: The item could not be moved.
store.fileRenameError: The file could not be renamed.
store.folderRenameError: The folder could not be renamed.
store.fileDeleteError: The file could not be deleted.
store.folderDeleteError: The folder could not be deleted.

updateNotification.title: Update {{version}} available
updateNotification.body: A new version of ScribeDog is ready.
updateNotification.installError: The update could not be installed.
